description:
## Background `bsm-kia.14` requires a final contract step once every consumer has migrated. Until the inline selectors and local helpers are deleted, the shotgun-surgery pattern can return: a future sidebar markup change would still touch every spec. This sub-issue removes the old form and proves its absence with a `rg` acceptance check. ## What to build Final delete-and-verify pass: prove that no spec contains the inline `[aria-label='Workspace']` selector or a local `expectSidebarWorkspacePath` / `expectSidebarWorkspaceAbsent`. The canonical implementation in `e2e/issue-list/helpers/sidebar.ts` is the only source. ## Technical Approach - Confirm every migrate sub-issue (`bsm-kia.14.2`, `bsm-kia.14.3`, `bsm-kia.14.4`, `bsm-kia.14.5`) has landed. - Run `rg "\[aria-label='Workspace'\]|p\.truncate|p\.text-muted|expectSidebarWorkspacePath|expectSidebarWorkspaceAbsent" e2e/issue-list/*.spec.ts` and confirm zero hits. If any hits remain, do not delete; either roll back the relevant migrate sub-issue or open a follow-up. - If `helpers/sidebar.ts` exports a temporary compatibility shim (e.g., re-export from the old location for one migrate batch), delete it. - Update `docs/agents/webdriver-e2e.md` if it references the old per-spec helpers or inline selectors by name. ## Considerations - This sub-issue is intentionally tiny: it must be a single deletion + verification commit, not a refactor. - If the contract step requires a non-trivial cleanup (e.g., a rename or signature change), split it further rather than blending with the contract. - Don't delete the helper module's symbols — only the old local selectors and helpers. ## Acceptance criteria - [ ] `rg "\[aria-label='Workspace'\]|p\.truncate|p\.text-muted|expectSidebarWorkspacePath|expectSidebarWorkspaceAbsent" e2e/issue-list/*.spec.ts` returns zero hits. - [ ] No spec file imports the sidebar helpers from a path other than `helpers/sidebar.ts`. - [ ] Renaming the sidebar `

` class in `WorkspaceSelector.tsx` now touches one helper file, not four spec files. - [ ] `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` and `pnpm e2e:issue-list:isolation` pass. ## Test Plan - Run `pnpm exec ultracite check`, `pnpm test`, and `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit` — all must pass. - Run `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` and `pnpm e2e:issue-list:isolation` to prove no behavioral regression. - Inspect the final diff: every spec file's inline sidebar selectors and local helpers are gone, and the only declarations of the affected selectors and helpers live in `helpers/sidebar.ts`.
title: Contract: delete inline sidebar selectors and local helpers
